steps.title: Spot the defining claim
steps.content: Right after “undergone a great deal,” Trofimov describes his circumstances: hunger, illness, being shaken, and being tossed about by fate.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: ”Endured” expresses persisting through hardship — exactly matching this context. The other choices either name unrelated concepts (neglected, conveyed) or contradict the tone (enjoyed). That matches choice D — D is correct.
